It's like I’m stuck in this loop of fear and frustration.

patient.query: It makes me feel really defeated, I guess. I mean, when I focus on what I haven’t done, it overshadows the times I’ve actually pushed through. It’s like I can't appreciate my efforts because I'm too busy beating myself up for not being perfect. Sometimes it feels like it just isn't enough, no matter what I do.
